page_content:
AOSC - Atmospheric and Oceanic Science

AOSC123 Causes and Consequences of Global Change (3 Credits) Study of the major components of Earth's climate system and climate change history. Discussion of 21st century climate change prediction, mitigation and adaptation efforts.

Cross-listed with: GEOL123.

Credit Only Granted for. AOSC123, GEOG123, or GEOL123.
